title: 🤭It seems that the Su-35 fell victim to Russian maps. According to...
title_en: 🤭It seems that the Su-35 fell victim to Russian maps. According to...
title_uk: 🤭Схоже, Су-35 став жертвою російських карт. Згідно...
description: 🤭It seems that the Su-35 fell victim to Russian maps. According to OSINT analysts, the fighter jet fell only 42 km from the front. It is assumed that the pilot could be sure that he was far from the line of hostilities, orienting himself on the maps of the Ministry of Defense of the Russian Federation. And there, as you know, they like to "finish" new captured territories and pass off what they want as real.
description_en: 🤭It seems that the Su-35 fell victim to Russian maps. According to OSINT analysts, the fighter jet fell only 42 km from the front. It is assumed that the pilot could be sure that he was far from the line of hostilities, orienting himself on the maps of the Ministry of Defense of the Russian Federation. And there, as you know, they like to "finish" new captured territories and pass off what they want as real.
description_uk: 🤭Похоже, Су-35 стал жертвой российских карт По данным OSINT-аналитиков, истребитель упал всего в 42 км от фронта. Предполагают, что пилот мог быть уверен, что находится далеко от линии боевых действий, ориентируясь по картам минобороны рф. А там, как известно, любят «дорисовывать» новые захваченные территории и выдавать желаемое за действительное.

title: Minus 12 tankers, a tug, a dry cargo, an oil terminal and an...
title_en: Minus 12 tankers, a tug, a dry cargo, an oil terminal and an...
title_uk: Мінус 12 танкерів, буксир, суховантаж, нафтовий термінал і...
description: Minus 12 tankers, a tug, a dry cargo, an oil terminal and an ammunition warehouse: the General Staff summarized the results of the night shift. The vessels were used to supply Russian troops with fuel and transport oil to circumvent sanctions. In addition, the Yug Rus oil terminal in the Rostov region and the enemy's ammunition depot in the Sorokino district of the Luhansk region were hit.
description_en: Minus 12 tankers, a tug, a dry cargo, an oil terminal and an ammunition warehouse: the General Staff summarized the results of the night shift. The vessels were used to supply Russian troops with fuel and transport oil to circumvent sanctions. In addition, the Yug Rus oil terminal in the Rostov region and the enemy's ammunition depot in the Sorokino district of the Luhansk region were hit.
description_uk: Минус 12 танкеров, буксир, сухогруз, нефтяной терминал и склад боеприпасов: Генштаб подвел итоги ночной гойды Судна использовали для снабжения российских войск топливом и перевозки нефти в обход санкций. Кроме того, под удар попал нефтеналивной терминал «Юг Руси» в Ростовской области и склад боеприпасов противника в районе Сорокино Луганской области.

title: Drone incoming
description: During the meeting with Prime Minister Ulf Kristersson, they discussed the strengthening of Ukrainian combat aviation and the training of our pilots. This year we have important agreements with Sweden in this direction, and this will greatly help strengthen our security. They also talked about the work on the preparation of the Drone Deal, the protection of our skies and the need for anti-ballistics. Russia continues to attack our cities and communities, massively...
description_en: During the meeting with Prime Minister Ulf Kristersson, they discussed the strengthening of Ukrainian combat aviation and the training of our pilots. This year we have important agreements with Sweden in this direction, and this will greatly help strengthen our security. They also talked about the work on the preparation of the Drone Deal, the protection of our skies and the need for anti-ballistics. Russia continues to attack our cities and communities, massively...
description_uk: Під час зустрічі з Прем’єр-міністром Ульфом Крістерссоном обговорили посилення української бойової авіації та підготовку наших пілотів. Цього року маємо важливі домовленості зі Швецією у цьому напрямі, і це значно допоможе зміцнити нашу безпеку. Говорили і про роботу над підготовкою Drone Deal, захист нашого неба та потреби в антибалістиці. Росія продовжує атакувати наші міста і громади, масовано...

title: Kharkiv: Casualties reported
description: Kharkiv residents say Russian strikes are becoming ‘less predictable’ as attacks kill 7, injure 121 across Ukraine. Russian forces struck the Nemyshlianskyi district of Kharkiv, the regional capital of northeastern Kharkiv Oblast, hitting a five-story residential building.
description_en: Kharkiv residents say Russian strikes are becoming ‘less predictable’ as attacks kill 7, injure 121 across Ukraine. Russian forces struck the Nemyshlianskyi district of Kharkiv, the regional capital of northeastern Kharkiv Oblast, hitting a five-story residential building.

title: Kherson: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: He met with the Chairman of the Council of Ministers of Italy Giorgia Maloni. It's an important conversation. Informed about the situation in Ukraine. Russia does not stop shelling our cities and communities. Today there were ballistic strikes again, and attack drones were launched. Unfortunately, there are casualties in Kyiv, Kharkiv and Kherson. Russia took the lives of five people. My condolences to family and friends. We discussed the prospects of joint work in Europe on...
description_en: He met with the Chairman of the Council of Ministers of Italy Giorgia Maloni. It's an important conversation. Informed about the situation in Ukraine. Russia does not stop shelling our cities and communities. Today there were ballistic strikes again, and attack drones were launched. Unfortunately, there are casualties in Kyiv, Kharkiv and Kherson. Russia took the lives of five people. My condolences to family and friends. We discussed the prospects of joint work in Europe on...
description_uk: Зустрівся з Головою Ради міністрів Італії Джорджею Мелоні. Важлива розмова. Поінформував про ситуацію в Україні. Росія не припиняє обстрілів наших міст і громад. Сьогодні знову були удари балістикою, запускали й ударні дрони. На жаль, є загиблі у Києві, Харкові та Херсоні. Росія забрала життя п’ятьох людей. Мої співчуття рідним і близьким. Ми обговорили перспективи спільної роботи в Європі над...
